message:
feat(vm-image): add comprehensive dev tools

- tmux, yq for system utilities
- uv for modern Python package management
- AWS, Azure, GCloud CLIs
- Codex AI assistant (alongside Claude Code)
- golangci-lint, ruff, eslint, prettier for linting
- clang, clang-format, clang-tidy for C/C++
- cmake, typescript

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -38,6 +38,11 @@ RUN apt-get update && apt-get install -y \
     # Build essentials
     build-essential \
     pkg-config \
+    cmake \
+    # C/C++ tools
+    clang \
+    clang-format \
+    clang-tidy \
     # Networking tools
     iproute2 \
     iptables \
@@ -46,8 +51,13 @@ RUN apt-get update && apt-get install -y \
     sudo \
     vim \
     less \
+    tmux \
     && rm -rf /var/lib/apt/lists/*
 
+# yq (YAML processor) - install from GitHub releases
+RUN curl -fsSL https://github.com/mikefarah/yq/releases/latest/download/yq_linux_amd64 -o /usr/local/bin/yq \
+    && chmod +x /usr/local/bin/yq
+
 # ============================================================================
 # Section 2: Programming Languages
 # ============================================================================
@@ -59,6 +69,9 @@ RUN apt-get update && apt-get install -y \
     python3-venv \
     && rm -rf /var/lib/apt/lists/*
 
+# uv - modern Python package manager (much faster than pip)
+COPY --from=ghcr.io/astral-sh/uv:latest /uv /usr/local/bin/uv
+
 # Node.js 20
 RUN curl -fsSL https://deb.nodesource.com/setup_20.x | bash - \
     && apt-get install -y nodejs \
@@ -87,6 +100,22 @@ RUN curl -fsSL https://cli.github.com/packages/githubcli-archive-keyring.gpg | d
     && apt-get install -y gh \
     && rm -rf /var/lib/apt/lists/*
 
+# AWS CLI v2
+RUN curl "https://awscli.amazonaws.com/awscli-exe-linux-x86_64.zip" -o "awscliv2.zip" \
+    && unzip awscliv2.zip \
+    && ./aws/install \
+    && rm -rf aws awscliv2.zip
+
+# Azure CLI
+RUN curl -sL https://aka.ms/InstallAzureCLIDeb | bash
+
+# Google Cloud CLI
+RUN curl https://packages.cloud.google.com/apt/doc/apt-key.gpg | gpg --dearmor -o /usr/share/keyrings/cloud.google.gpg \
+    && echo "deb [signed-by=/usr/share/keyrings/cloud.google.gpg] https://packages.cloud.google.com/apt cloud-sdk main" | tee /etc/apt/sources.list.d/google-cloud-sdk.list \
+    && apt-get update \
+    && apt-get install -y google-cloud-cli \
+    && rm -rf /var/lib/apt/lists/*
+
 # Tailscale (for secure networking)
 RUN curl -fsSL https://pkgs.tailscale.com/stable/ubuntu/noble.noarmor.gpg | tee /usr/share/keyrings/tailscale-archive-keyring.gpg > /dev/null \
     && curl -fsSL https://pkgs.tailscale.com/stable/ubuntu/noble.tailscale-keyring.list | tee /etc/apt/sources.list.d/tailscale.list \
@@ -105,6 +134,23 @@ RUN echo 'FLAGS="--tun=userspace-networking"' >> /etc/default/tailscaled
 # Claude Code (Anthropic's CLI for Claude)
 RUN npm install -g @anthropic-ai/claude-code
 
+# OpenAI Codex CLI
+RUN npm install -g @openai/codex
+
+# ============================================================================
+# Section 4b: Linters and Formatters
+# ============================================================================
+
+# Go linter (golangci-lint)
+RUN curl -sSfL https://raw.githubusercontent.com/golangci/golangci-lint/master/install.sh | sh -s -- -b /usr/local/bin
+
+# Python linter/formatter (ruff - extremely fast)
+RUN /usr/local/bin/uv tool install ruff \
+    && ln -s /root/.local/bin/ruff /usr/local/bin/ruff
+
+# JavaScript/TypeScript linters and formatters
+RUN npm install -g eslint prettier typescript
+
 # ============================================================================
 # Section 5: User Setup
 # ============================================================================

@@ -37,10 +37,35 @@ ROOTFS_SIZE=20G sudo ./convert-to-rootfs.sh
 
 ## What's Included
 
-- **Languages**: Python 3, Node.js 20, Go 1.22, Rust
-- **Tools**: git, gh (GitHub CLI), Claude Code
-- **Networking**: Tailscale (userspace mode for Firecracker)
-- **User**: `mooby` with passwordless sudo (configurable via `VM_USER`)
+### Languages & Runtimes
+- **Python 3** with uv (modern package manager)
+- **Node.js 20** (LTS)
+- **Go 1.22**
+- **Rust** (via rustup)
+- **C/C++** (clang, cmake, build-essential)
+
+### AI Coding Assistants
+- **Claude Code** (Anthropic)
+- **Codex** (OpenAI)
+
+### Cloud CLIs
+- **AWS CLI v2**
+- **Azure CLI**
+- **Google Cloud CLI**
+- **GitHub CLI** (gh)
+
+### Linters & Formatters
+- **Go**: golangci-lint
+- **Python**: ruff
+- **JavaScript/TypeScript**: eslint, prettier, typescript
+- **C/C++**: clang-format, clang-tidy
+
+### System Tools
+- git, tmux, vim, jq, yq
+- Tailscale (userspace mode for Firecracker)
+
+### User
+- `mooby` with passwordless sudo (configurable via `VM_USER`)
 
 ## VM Configuration
